What's New In rPickle 0.11
====================================

:Release: 2026-07-15
:Version: 0.11.2

Core Breakthrough
-----------------

- Introduced ``_R`` placeholder + ``_fix`` post-processing
- Fully resolved circular references for immutable types:
  ``tuple``, ``frozenset``, ``frozendict``

Testing
-------

- Circular reference coverage is now complete
